<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check grid cells colors
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
grid_cells = []
for n in nodes:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]

    min_col, max_col = min(cols), max(cols)
    if 48 <= min_row <= 60 and 24 <= min_col <= 38:
